scripts.export:images:
mkdir -p images && <<< $'16
32
48
128' xargs -I@ rsvg-convert -w @ -h @ public/am.svg -o images/am@.png && magick images/am*.png favicon.ico
scripts.export:bundle: bun build src/worker.ts --outfile service_worker.js --minify --define import.meta.url=location.origin && bun build src/convert.ts --outfile convert.js --minify
scripts.export:pack: zip -r --filesync asciimath-unicode.zip manifest.json images/*.png favicon.ico convert.js service_worker.js convert_bg.wasm out
scripts.export: bun export:images && bun export:wasm && bun export:bundle && bun export:next && bun export:pack
scripts.pack: bun lint && bun test --coverage && bun export
